catalog.description: Template catalog configuration. Defines which feature templates are available and how they are resolved.

environments.description: Environment configuration files for development and testing. Defines supporting services and infrastructure components shared across features.

compose.description: Docker Compose configurations used to launch shared development services.

features.description: All feature implementations. Each feature is a self-contained functional component with its own source code, dependencies, tests, and development environment.

shared.description: Shared resources used across multiple features, including API schemas, data contracts, test data, shared utilities, and common libraries.

libs.description: Shared libraries that provide reusable functionality across multiple features. Organized by programming language.

prompts.description: Prompt definitions and templates, potentially organized by phases.

work.description: Temporary working directories and development worktrees. Used for Git worktrees, parallel feature development, automated agent sessions, and experimentation.
